text.title: ai-powered-pm-tools Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-powered-pm-tools as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using AI work breakdown for niche domains (embedded systems, ML pipelines) without customization.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI work breakdown is trained on general software patterns; domain-specific subtask suggestions are irrelevant and mislead planning.

failure-mode.description: Mixing velocity predictions from vendor AI (ClickUp Brain, Jira) with Claude inferences in the same report.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The models are different; unlabeled mixed predictions confuse stakeholders and corrupt trend analysis.

failure-mode.description: Running AI velocity prediction on fewer than 6 sprints of history.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Predictions require calibrated patterns; new teams get noise, not signal — and act on it.
